overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Hogwarts Legacy showing a student character exploring the Slytherin Dungeon common room. The character walks through dimly lit stone corridors with gothic architecture, twisted vine pillars, and medieval furnishings, eventually approaching and sitting on a leather couch in a lounge area.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic dungeon corridor with stone sculptures and wooden shelving

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the dungeon corridor, passing stone sculptures and wooden shelves on either side

entered.detail: large carved stone face with open mouth set into the dungeon wall
thick twisted wooden or vine-like columns supporting the structure
dark wood shelving unit with glass bottles and objects

segments.scene_description: The character begins in a narrow gothic dungeon corridor, walking past a prominent stone face sculpture carved into the left wall. Twisted vine-like pillars and wooden shelving units line the path as the character moves deeper into the Slytherin common room.

scene_state.functional_zone: tall gothic hall with upper balconies and arched doorways

events.description: camera tilts upward to reveal upper level balconies and high ceilings

agents.ego_description: continuing forward while looking up at the upper balconies and arched architecture overhead

entered.detail: elevated walkways with stone railings visible on upper levels
tall gothic arched doorways leading to other chambers

segments.scene_description: Moving into a more open hall with high ceilings, the camera tilts up to reveal upper balconies and gothic arches. The twisted pillars move from the right side to the left as the character progresses, while the stone face and shelves fall behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: dungeon lounge area with leather seating and decorative rugs

events.description: character sits down on the leather couch

agents.ego_description: approaching the seating area and sitting down on the leather couch

entered.detail: brown leather sofa with cushions positioned on a circular rug
ornate circular patterned rug on the stone floor
small dark wood table with items placed beside the couch

segments.scene_description: The character enters a lounge area featuring a leather couch and small wooden tables arranged on an ornate circular rug. The character approaches the seating and sits down, concluding the exploration of the dungeon common room.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a narrow gothic dungeon that gradually opens into a spacious, furnished lounge. It begins in a confined corridor, gliding past a stone face sculpture and wooden shelving units flanked by twisted vine-like pillars. As the character progresses, the space expands into a high-ceilinged hall where the camera tilts upward to reveal towering gothic arches and upper balconies. The scene then shifts from the architectural grandeur of the hall toward a cozy seating area featuring an ornate circular rug and small wooden tables. Finally, the camera follows the character as they approach and sit upon a leather couch, bringing the exploration of the common room to a close.
